title: Wipro is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Wipro is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Wipro has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wipro:
Wipro is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro!
